creator: sergei@FreeBSD.org
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

Scott,

Thanks for your report!

The point you raised is a valid concern. However, I, as the port
maintainer, do believe that version 4.3.2 is sufficiently stable for the
most zsh users. Moreover, it brings several new features which were
long-awaited by many - e.g. multi-byte support, etc.

I do see your point, though, and I am prepared to reconsider the current
situation with zsh vs. zsh-devel (or even zsh-stable) ports should any
of the future upgrade make this port unstable.

I hope this clarifies the situation.

Thanks

- --
Sergei Kolobov // PGP: 0x3BA53401
